scripts.dev:mobile:dev: node scripts/select-mobile-env.cjs development && pnpm --filter mobile dev
scripts.dev:mobile:test: node scripts/select-mobile-env.cjs test && pnpm --filter mobile dev
scripts.supabase:functions:deploy:dev: node scripts/run-supabase-target.cjs development functions deploy delete-account
scripts.supabase:functions:deploy:test: node scripts/run-supabase-target.cjs test functions deploy delete-account
scripts.verify:mobile: pnpm --filter mobile exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter mobile test && pnpm --filter mobile lint && pnpm --filter mobile web:build
